name: stm-serial-flasher
description: Programmer for STM microcontrollers with the embedded bootloader using Cromium's serial port API

scripts.nodeapp:run-dfu: npm run -s build && node build/nodeapp/cli.js --transport dfu --file ./BootloaderChg_G0_V_1_0_7_210426.hex
scripts.nodeapp:run-romboot-dfu: npm run -s build && node build/nodeapp/cli.js --transport dfu-romboot --file ./BootloaderChg_G0_V_1_0_7_210426.hex
scripts.nodeapp:run-romboot-dfu-fixed: npm run -s build && node build/nodeapp/cli.js --transport dfu-romboot --file ./BootloaderChg_G0_V_1_0_7_210426.hex --romboot-port /dev/tty.usbmodem205C337C46421 --go
scripts.nodeapp:run-romboot-dfu-fixed-2: npm run -s build && node build/nodeapp/cli.js --transport dfu-romboot --file ./BootloaderChg_G0-1.0.3.hex --romboot-port /dev/tty.usbmodem205C337C46421 --go

author: Gamadril
